objects.name: FamousSparrow targets Azerbaijani energy sector in multi-wave espionage campaign
objects.description: Chinese-linked FamousSparrow repeatedly targeted an Azerbaijani oil and gas company, reusing the same entry point in three intrusions from Dec 2025 to Feb 2026. Chinese-linked threat actor FamousSparrow has conducted a sustained intrusion campaign against an Azerbaijani oil and gas company, returning to the same compromised entry point three separate times between late December 2025 […]

external_references.description: FamousSparrow targets Azerbaijani energy sector in multi-wave espionage campaign
